action.reasoning: Observation: In iteration 20, the episode terminated early at 253 steps, and test_follower.py crashed with an AssertionError because the loop condition `while not done:` was never updated. Analysis: The early termination was likely caused by the robot getting stuck in an infinite recovery loop or colliding with the human. The AssertionError was a simple bug in the test script. Decision: I will fix the loop condition to `while not env.episode_over:`. I will also refine the unstuck logic to be much more robust: if stuck while backing up, Spot will turn in place until the human is behind it, then flee forward. If the human is behind Spot and too close, Spot will simply run straight forward without turning. I will update predict.py and test_follower.py, run test_follower.py to verify, and submit eval.
